entry.title: Hello World
entry.content:
ZZE AK IOI

ZZE AK IOI

ZZE AK IOI

Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.

Quick Start

Create a new post

More info: Writing

Run server

More info: Server

Generate static files

More info: Generating

Deploy to remote sites

More info: Deployment

sjohpasdiupfdsaiuhusrfuigsdfiohwqasgiuobnqaHDOIUVBASsjhdPSFIYODCFSACOIHCSFAHVDUJHFSIDG;LKFVIOPFHFUJJUJJJDFJKDJJJKJIKKKKKCHVVXZOLKZXNVLKASnf;LASjmfLK’ASHF

[;DCKLSBFDMAKLFNSF LASD GK;SNVKJLNdas”,F[

PASDKGFMP’ASLGH;LSNDV;Sa gvfMSDKLJGSAD;DSL;FA

F]]

#include <bits/stdc++.h>

using namespace std;

const int N = 3e5 + 5;
priority_queue heap;
int d;
int n, m;
int ecnt, nxt[N], head[N], to[N], cnt[N], ans[N];
inline void add_edge (int u, int v)
{
nxt[++ ecnt] = head[u];
to[ecnt] = v;
head[u] = ecnt;
cnt[v] ++;
}

int main ()
{
scanf (“%d”, &d);
while (d –)
{
int i, x, y, tot = 0;
ecnt = 0;
memset (adj, 0, sizeof (adj));
memset (cnt, 0, sizeof (cnt));
scanf (“%d %d”, &n, &m);
bool flag = 0;
for (int i = 1; i <= m; i ++)
{
scanf (“%d %d”, &x, &y);
add_edge (x, y);
if (x == y)
flag = 1;
}
if (flag)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = 1; i <= n; i ++)
if (!cnt[i])
heap.push (i);
while (!heap.empty ())
{
int u = heap.top ();
heap.pop ();
ans[++ tot] = u; // 记录
for (int e = head[u], v; e; e = nxt[e])
if (! (– cnt[v = to[e]])) // 入度为 0
heap.push (v);
}
if (tot < n)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = n; i; i –)
cout << ans[i] << “ “;

}

} #include <bits/stdc++.h>

scanf (“%d %d”, &n, &m);
bool flag = 0;
for (int i = 1; i <= m; i ++)
{
scanf (“%d %d”, &x, &y);
add_edge (x, y);
if (x == y)
flag = 1;
}
if (flag)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = 1; i <= n; i ++)
if (!cnt[i])
heap.push (i);
while (!heap.empty ())
{
int u = heap.top ();
heap.pop ();
ans[++ tot] = u; // 记录
for (int e = head[u], v; e; e = nxt[e])
if (! (– cnt[v = to[e]])) // 入度为 0
heap.push (v);
}
if (tot < n)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = n; i; i –)
cout << ans[i] << “ “;

}

ecnt = 0;
memset (adj, 0, sizeof (adj));
memset (cnt, 0, sizeof (cnt));
scanf (“%d %d”, &n, &m);
bool flag = 0;
for (int i = 1; i <= m; i ++)
{
scanf (“%d %d”, &x, &y);
add_edge (x, y);
if (x == y)
flag = 1;
}
if (flag)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = 1; i <= n; i ++)
if (!cnt[i])
heap.push (i);
while (!heap.empty ())
{
int u = heap.top ();
heap.pop ();
ans[++ tot] = u; // 记录
for (int e = head[u], v; e; e = nxt[e])
if (! (– cnt[v = to[e]])) // 入度为 0
heap.push (v);
}
if (tot < n)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = n; i; i –)
cout << ans[i] << “ “;

}

} #include <bits/stdc++.h>

while (d –)
{
int i, x, y, tot = 0;
ecnt = 0;
memset (adj, 0, sizeof (adj));
memset (cnt, 0, sizeof (cnt));
scanf (“%d %d”, &n, &m);
bool flag = 0;
for (int i = 1; i <= m; i ++)
{
scanf (“%d %d”, &x, &y);
add_edge (x, y);
if (x == y)
flag = 1;
}
if (flag)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = 1; i <= n; i ++)
if (!cnt[i])
heap.push (i);
while (!heap.empty ())
{
int u = heap.top ();
heap.pop ();
ans[++ tot] = u; // 记录
for (int e = head[u], v; e; e = nxt[e])
if (! (– cnt[v = to[e]])) // 入度为 0
heap.push (v);
}
if (tot < n)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = n; i; i –)
cout << ans[i] << “ “;

}

cnt[v] ++;
}

int main ()
{
scanf (“%d”, &d);
while (d –)
{
int i, x, y, tot = 0;
ecnt = 0;
memset (adj, 0, sizeof (adj));
memset (cnt, 0, sizeof (cnt));
scanf (“%d %d”, &n, &m);
bool flag = 0;
for (int i = 1; i <= m; i ++)
{
scanf (“%d %d”, &x, &y);
add_edge (x, y);
if (x == y)
flag = 1;
}
if (flag)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = 1; i <= n; i ++)
if (!cnt[i])
heap.push (i);
while (!heap.empty ())
{
int u = heap.top ();
heap.pop ();
ans[++ tot] = u; // 记录
for (int e = head[u], v; e; e = nxt[e])
if (! (– cnt[v = to[e]])) // 入度为 0
heap.push (v);
}
if (tot < n)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = n; i; i –)
cout << ans[i] << “ “;

}

head[u] = ecnt;
cnt[v] ++;
}

int main ()
{
scanf (“%d”, &d);
while (d –)
{
int i, x, y, tot = 0;
ecnt = 0;
memset (adj, 0, sizeof (adj));
memset (cnt, 0, sizeof (cnt));
scanf (“%d %d”, &n, &m);
bool flag = 0;
for (int i = 1; i <= m; i ++)
{
scanf (“%d %d”, &x, &y);
add_edge (x, y);
if (x == y)
flag = 1;
}
if (flag)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = 1; i <= n; i ++)
if (!cnt[i])
heap.push (i);
while (!heap.empty ())
{
int u = heap.top ();
heap.pop ();
ans[++ tot] = u; // 记录
for (int e = head[u], v; e; e = nxt[e])
if (! (– cnt[v = to[e]])) // 入度为 0
heap.push (v);
}
if (tot < n)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = n; i; i –)
cout << ans[i] << “ “;

}

int ecnt, nxt[N], head[N], to[N], cnt[N], ans[N];
inline void add_edge (int u, int v)
{
nxt[++ ecnt] = head[u];
to[ecnt] = v;
head[u] = ecnt;
cnt[v] ++;
}

int main ()
{
scanf (“%d”, &d);
while (d –)
{
int i, x, y, tot = 0;
ecnt = 0;
memset (adj, 0, sizeof (adj));
memset (cnt, 0, sizeof (cnt));
scanf (“%d %d”, &n, &m);
bool flag = 0;
for (int i = 1; i <= m; i ++)
{
scanf (“%d %d”, &x, &y);
add_edge (x, y);
if (x == y)
flag = 1;
}
if (flag)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = 1; i <= n; i ++)
if (!cnt[i])
heap.push (i);
while (!heap.empty ())
{
int u = heap.top ();
heap.pop ();
ans[++ tot] = u; // 记录
for (int e = head[u], v; e; e = nxt[e])
if (! (– cnt[v = to[e]])) // 入度为 0
heap.push (v);
}
if (tot < n)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = n; i; i –)
cout << ans[i] << “ “;

}

} #include <bits/stdc++.h>

priority_queue heap;
int d;
int n, m;
int ecnt, nxt[N], head[N], to[N], cnt[N], ans[N];
inline void add_edge (int u, int v)
{
nxt[++ ecnt] = head[u];
to[ecnt] = v;
head[u] = ecnt;
cnt[v] ++;
}

int main ()
{
scanf (“%d”, &d);
while (d –)
{
int i, x, y, tot = 0;
ecnt = 0;
memset (adj, 0, sizeof (adj));
memset (cnt, 0, sizeof (cnt));
scanf (“%d %d”, &n, &m);
bool flag = 0;
for (int i = 1; i <= m; i ++)
{
scanf (“%d %d”, &x, &y);
add_edge (x, y);
if (x == y)
flag = 1;
}
if (flag)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = 1; i <= n; i ++)
if (!cnt[i])
heap.push (i);
while (!heap.empty ())
{
int u = heap.top ();
heap.pop ();
ans[++ tot] = u; // 记录
for (int e = head[u], v; e; e = nxt[e])
if (! (– cnt[v = to[e]])) // 入度为 0
heap.push (v);
}
if (tot < n)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = n; i; i –)
cout << ans[i] << “ “;

}

} #include <bits/stdc++.h>

const int N = 3e5 + 5;
priority_queue heap;
int d;
int n, m;
int ecnt, nxt[N], head[N], to[N], cnt[N], ans[N];
inline void add_edge (int u, int v)
{
nxt[++ ecnt] = head[u];
to[ecnt] = v;
head[u] = ecnt;
cnt[v] ++;
}

int main ()
{
scanf (“%d”, &d);
while (d –)
{
int i, x, y, tot = 0;
ecnt = 0;
memset (adj, 0, sizeof (adj));
memset (cnt, 0, sizeof (cnt));
scanf (“%d %d”, &n, &m);
bool flag = 0;
for (int i = 1; i <= m; i ++)
{
scanf (“%d %d”, &x, &y);
add_edge (x, y);
if (x == y)
flag = 1;
}
if (flag)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = 1; i <= n; i ++)
if (!cnt[i])
heap.push (i);
while (!heap.empty ())
{
int u = heap.top ();
heap.pop ();
ans[++ tot] = u; // 记录
for (int e = head[u], v; e; e = nxt[e])
if (! (– cnt[v = to[e]])) // 入度为 0
heap.push (v);
}
if (tot < n)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = n; i; i –)
cout << ans[i] << “ “;

}

} #include <bits/stdc++.h>

} #include <bits/stdc++.h>

using namespace std;

const int N = 3e5 + 5;
priority_queue heap;
int d;
int n, m;
int ecnt, nxt[N], head[N], to[N], cnt[N], ans[N];
inline void add_edge (int u, int v)
{
nxt[++ ecnt] = head[u];
to[ecnt] = v;
head[u] = ecnt;
cnt[v] ++;
}

int main ()
{
scanf (“%d”, &d);
while (d –)
{
int i, x, y, tot = 0;
ecnt = 0;
memset (adj, 0, sizeof (adj));
memset (cnt, 0, sizeof (cnt));
scanf (“%d %d”, &n, &m);
bool flag = 0;
for (int i = 1; i <= m; i ++)
{
scanf (“%d %d”, &x, &y);
add_edge (x, y);
if (x == y)
flag = 1;
}
if (flag)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = 1; i <= n; i ++)
if (!cnt[i])
heap.push (i);
while (!heap.empty ())
{
int u = heap.top ();
heap.pop ();
ans[++ tot] = u; // 记录
for (int e = head[u], v; e; e = nxt[e])
if (! (– cnt[v = to[e]])) // 入度为 0
heap.push (v);
}
if (tot < n)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = n; i; i –)
cout << ans[i] << “ “;

}

} #include <bits/stdc++.h>

using namespace std;

const int N = 3e5 + 5;
priority_queue heap;
int d;
int n, m;
int ecnt, nxt[N], head[N], to[N], cnt[N], ans[N];
inline void add_edge (int u, int v)
{
nxt[++ ecnt] = head[u];
to[ecnt] = v;
head[u] = ecnt;
cnt[v] ++;
}

int main ()
{
scanf (“%d”, &d);
while (d –)
{
int i, x, y, tot = 0;
ecnt = 0;
memset (adj, 0, sizeof (adj));
memset (cnt, 0, sizeof (cnt));
scanf (“%d %d”, &n, &m);
bool flag = 0;
for (int i = 1; i <= m; i ++)
{
scanf (“%d %d”, &x, &y);
add_edge (x, y);
if (x == y)
flag = 1;
}
if (flag)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = 1; i <= n; i ++)
if (!cnt[i])
heap.push (i);
while (!heap.empty ())
{
int u = heap.top ();
heap.pop ();
ans[++ tot] = u; // 记录
for (int e = head[u], v; e; e = nxt[e])
if (! (– cnt[v = to[e]])) // 入度为 0
heap.push (v);
}
if (tot < n)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = n; i; i –)
cout << ans[i] << “ “;

}

for (int i = 1; i <= m; i ++)
{
scanf (“%d %d”, &x, &y);
add_edge (x, y);
if (x == y)
flag = 1;
}
if (flag)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = 1; i <= n; i ++)
if (!cnt[i])
heap.push (i);
while (!heap.empty ())
{
int u = heap.top ();
heap.pop ();
ans[++ tot] = u; // 记录
for (int e = head[u], v; e; e = nxt[e])
if (! (– cnt[v = to[e]])) // 入度为 0
heap.push (v);
}
if (tot < n)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = n; i; i –)
cout << ans[i] << “ “;

}

memset (cnt, 0, sizeof (cnt));
scanf (“%d %d”, &n, &m);
bool flag = 0;
for (int i = 1; i <= m; i ++)
{
scanf (“%d %d”, &x, &y);
add_edge (x, y);
if (x == y)
flag = 1;
}
if (flag)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = 1; i <= n; i ++)
if (!cnt[i])
heap.push (i);
while (!heap.empty ())
{
int u = heap.top ();
heap.pop ();
ans[++ tot] = u; // 记录
for (int e = head[u], v; e; e = nxt[e])
if (! (– cnt[v = to[e]])) // 入度为 0
heap.push (v);
}
if (tot < n)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = n; i; i –)
cout << ans[i] << “ “;

}

} #include <bits/stdc++.h>

int i, x, y, tot = 0;
ecnt = 0;
memset (adj, 0, sizeof (adj));
memset (cnt, 0, sizeof (cnt));
scanf (“%d %d”, &n, &m);
bool flag = 0;
for (int i = 1; i <= m; i ++)
{
scanf (“%d %d”, &x, &y);
add_edge (x, y);
if (x == y)
flag = 1;
}
if (flag)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = 1; i <= n; i ++)
if (!cnt[i])
heap.push (i);
while (!heap.empty ())
{
int u = heap.top ();
heap.pop ();
ans[++ tot] = u; // 记录
for (int e = head[u], v; e; e = nxt[e])
if (! (– cnt[v = to[e]])) // 入度为 0
heap.push (v);
}
if (tot < n)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = n; i; i –)
cout << ans[i] << “ “;

}

{
scanf (“%d”, &d);
while (d –)
{
int i, x, y, tot = 0;
ecnt = 0;
memset (adj, 0, sizeof (adj));
memset (cnt, 0, sizeof (cnt));
scanf (“%d %d”, &n, &m);
bool flag = 0;
for (int i = 1; i <= m; i ++)
{
scanf (“%d %d”, &x, &y);
add_edge (x, y);
if (x == y)
flag = 1;
}
if (flag)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = 1; i <= n; i ++)
if (!cnt[i])
heap.push (i);
while (!heap.empty ())
{
int u = heap.top ();
heap.pop ();
ans[++ tot] = u; // 记录
for (int e = head[u], v; e; e = nxt[e])
if (! (– cnt[v = to[e]])) // 入度为 0
heap.push (v);
}
if (tot < n)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = n; i; i –)
cout << ans[i] << “ “;

}

} #include <bits/stdc++.h>

head[u] = ecnt;
cnt[v] ++;
}

int main ()
{
scanf (“%d”, &d);
while (d –)
{
int i, x, y, tot = 0;
ecnt = 0;
memset (adj, 0, sizeof (adj));
memset (cnt, 0, sizeof (cnt));
scanf (“%d %d”, &n, &m);
bool flag = 0;
for (int i = 1; i <= m; i ++)
{
scanf (“%d %d”, &x, &y);
add_edge (x, y);
if (x == y)
flag = 1;
}
if (flag)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = 1; i <= n; i ++)
if (!cnt[i])
heap.push (i);
while (!heap.empty ())
{
int u = heap.top ();
heap.pop ();
ans[++ tot] = u; // 记录
for (int e = head[u], v; e; e = nxt[e])
if (! (– cnt[v = to[e]])) // 入度为 0
heap.push (v);
}
if (tot < n)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = n; i; i –)
cout << ans[i] << “ “;

}

to[ecnt] = v;
head[u] = ecnt;
cnt[v] ++;
}

int main ()
{
scanf (“%d”, &d);
while (d –)
{
int i, x, y, tot = 0;
ecnt = 0;
memset (adj, 0, sizeof (adj));
memset (cnt, 0, sizeof (cnt));
scanf (“%d %d”, &n, &m);
bool flag = 0;
for (int i = 1; i <= m; i ++)
{
scanf (“%d %d”, &x, &y);
add_edge (x, y);
if (x == y)
flag = 1;
}
if (flag)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = 1; i <= n; i ++)
if (!cnt[i])
heap.push (i);
while (!heap.empty ())
{
int u = heap.top ();
heap.pop ();
ans[++ tot] = u; // 记录
for (int e = head[u], v; e; e = nxt[e])
if (! (– cnt[v = to[e]])) // 入度为 0
heap.push (v);
}
if (tot < n)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = n; i; i –)
cout << ans[i] << “ “;

}

inline void add_edge (int u, int v)
{
nxt[++ ecnt] = head[u];
to[ecnt] = v;
head[u] = ecnt;
cnt[v] ++;
}

int main ()
{
scanf (“%d”, &d);
while (d –)
{
int i, x, y, tot = 0;
ecnt = 0;
memset (adj, 0, sizeof (adj));
memset (cnt, 0, sizeof (cnt));
scanf (“%d %d”, &n, &m);
bool flag = 0;
for (int i = 1; i <= m; i ++)
{
scanf (“%d %d”, &x, &y);
add_edge (x, y);
if (x == y)
flag = 1;
}
if (flag)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = 1; i <= n; i ++)
if (!cnt[i])
heap.push (i);
while (!heap.empty ())
{
int u = heap.top ();
heap.pop ();
ans[++ tot] = u; // 记录
for (int e = head[u], v; e; e = nxt[e])
if (! (– cnt[v = to[e]])) // 入度为 0
heap.push (v);
}
if (tot < n)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = n; i; i –)
cout << ans[i] << “ “;

}

} #include <bits/stdc++.h>

const int N = 3e5 + 5;
priority_queue heap;
int d;
int n, m;
int ecnt, nxt[N], head[N], to[N], cnt[N], ans[N];
inline void add_edge (int u, int v)
{
nxt[++ ecnt] = head[u];
to[ecnt] = v;
head[u] = ecnt;
cnt[v] ++;
}

int main ()
{
scanf (“%d”, &d);
while (d –)
{
int i, x, y, tot = 0;
ecnt = 0;
memset (adj, 0, sizeof (adj));
memset (cnt, 0, sizeof (cnt));
scanf (“%d %d”, &n, &m);
bool flag = 0;
for (int i = 1; i <= m; i ++)
{
scanf (“%d %d”, &x, &y);
add_edge (x, y);
if (x == y)
flag = 1;
}
if (flag)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = 1; i <= n; i ++)
if (!cnt[i])
heap.push (i);
while (!heap.empty ())
{
int u = heap.top ();
heap.pop ();
ans[++ tot] = u; // 记录
for (int e = head[u], v; e; e = nxt[e])
if (! (– cnt[v = to[e]])) // 入度为 0
heap.push (v);
}
if (tot < n)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = n; i; i –)
cout << ans[i] << “ “;

}

} #include <bits/stdc++.h>

using namespace std;

const int N = 3e5 + 5;
priority_queue heap;
int d;
int n, m;
int ecnt, nxt[N], head[N], to[N], cnt[N], ans[N];
inline void add_edge (int u, int v)
{
nxt[++ ecnt] = head[u];
to[ecnt] = v;
head[u] = ecnt;
cnt[v] ++;
}

int main ()
{
scanf (“%d”, &d);
while (d –)
{
int i, x, y, tot = 0;
ecnt = 0;
memset (adj, 0, sizeof (adj));
memset (cnt, 0, sizeof (cnt));
scanf (“%d %d”, &n, &m);
bool flag = 0;
for (int i = 1; i <= m; i ++)
{
scanf (“%d %d”, &x, &y);
add_edge (x, y);
if (x == y)
flag = 1;
}
if (flag)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = 1; i <= n; i ++)
if (!cnt[i])
heap.push (i);
while (!heap.empty ())
{
int u = heap.top ();
heap.pop ();
ans[++ tot] = u; // 记录
for (int e = head[u], v; e; e = nxt[e])
if (! (– cnt[v = to[e]])) // 入度为 0
heap.push (v);
}
if (tot < n)
{
puts (“Impossible!”);
continue;
}
for (int i = n; i; i –)
cout << ans[i] << “ “;

}
